title: Teaching-Learning Process for Metric Spaces Module
description: A flowchart illustrating the chalk-and-talk and PowerPoint presentation methods for teaching Complete Metric Spaces and Continuous Functions.
relationships: Instructor uses Chalkboard for step-by-step proofs and derivations
Instructor uses PowerPoint for presenting structured definitions and key examples
Students engage with both methods, asking questions and taking notes
Process culminates in an interactive problem-solving session to reinforce understanding
